result.stdout:
DotNetMetrics - Real-time .NET process monitoring tool

Usage: dotnet-metrics <PID> [--out|-o <file>]
   or: dotnet metrics <PID> [--out|-o <file>]

Parameters:
  <PID>           Process ID to monitor
  --out, -o       Output file path (optional)
                  If specified, writes JSON to file instead of console

Examples:
  dotnet-metrics 1234
  dotnet-metrics 1234 --out metrics.json
  dotnet-metrics 1234 -o C:\temp\process-metrics.json

To find process PID:
  Windows: Get-Process | Where-Object {$_.ProcessName -like '*your-app*'}
  Linux:   ps aux | grep your-app
  macOS:   ps aux | grep your-app
